visa_types.name: Long term immigration visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click here for Documents required for Work Visa (D1 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Interns and Mass Media (D2 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Student Visa (D3 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Family Reunion Visa (D4 category)

Please click here for Documents required for Individuals who have right of owning property in Georgia (D5 category)
Note: A document necessary to issue a visa shall be submitted to a visa issuing authority in Georgian or in English language. A document drawn up in another foreign language shall be submitted together with the duly certified (notarized) Georgian or English translation.
To issue a long-term Georgian visa, apostilled or legalized originals or copies of documents (if the documents need to be legalized or apostilled) shall be submitted to a visa issuing authority. 
Note – 04 months valid Travel and Health insurance required for all Long-Term visa categories.
NEET certificate validation mandatory for Indian medical students & need to be done at VFS centre.
NEET Verification Fee : 538 INR
visa_types.visa_fees:
Mode of Payment - Cash/Card.
The applicable visa fee in INR is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee is non-refundable.

[Table:   Long term immigration visa]
Service Fee:
1500 INR per application (Inc. of GST and Convenience Fee) for PAN India Centers
- Mandatory courier for satellite locations INR 846
- NEET Validation Charges INR 538/- for Medical Student category.
For Applicants applying from  Bangladesh
- The  acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by TT (Telegraphic transfer) US  Dollars (USD). Applicants can approach Bank of convenience, and should follow  the below process;
- Fill up a deposit slip & TM form with information of account details Embassy of Georgia 409000600421 RBL BANK with the below Swift Code
RATNINBBXXX
- Need  to carry and provide Passport copy
- Carry  print of the visa fee detail stated in the website
Applicant need to go to the VFS  center with the proof of visa fee payment.
- The  visa fee is non-refundable.
- There  is a service charge of BDT 4492/-
- The applicable visa fee is USD20.
For Applicants applying from Sri Lanka
- The visa fee is non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 9087/- (53 USD) Note : “Any demand draft having contradicting MICR number or incorrect information shall not be acceptable”
- The applicable visa fee is in LKR       4060/-.
visa_types.processing_time:
- Processing time for Long-term visa applications (for D1, D2, D4, D5 category) at the Embassy of Georgia is minimum 2 month.
- Processing time for Long-term visa applications (for D3 category) at the Embassy of Georgia is as per below table:

[Table:   Long term immigration visa processing time]
- Important notice: The above‑mentioned periods start from the day the application is delivered to the Embassy of Georgia. To track the application delivery date, please visit “track  your application (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/AYvpqV+ro69aR1c81Q/VGoPJgA+rLXdPLREIT8WQZekZrmPsx/gq0paEDF6diBWtg==)”.
- Please, be informed that the processing time may  be reduced or prolonged, which you will be notified about by the Embassy of  Georgia.
- Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned estimated processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
- Please be sure to submit your visa application  well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Depending on the purpose of your travel to Georgia, there are different categories of visas that will apply to the occasion. Whether you are planning to go on a visit, study or work and reside there permanently, 
                                you will have to apply for a different Georgian Visa, accordingly. Depending on the purpose of travelling you may be granted a visa with the right of stay for a short-term period, long-term period or with the right 
                                for transiting the territory of Georgia. The authorized body for issuing, extending, and terminating Georgian visas is Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Georgia/Embassy of Georgia in India.
Short-term visa may be issued according to the number of days indicated in a visa application but for not more than 30 calendar days. And only if you have visited Georgia at least once during the previous year, 
                                and there are grounds for requesting short-term visa you may be granted with a short-term multiple-entry visa for a maximum of five years. Besides, the total period of an alien’s entry and stay in Georgia in any 
                                180-day period shall not exceed 90 calendar days.
Long-term visa may be issued with the right of multiple entries to Georgia for 90 calendar days or one year period of validity and stay.
Please note that all documents required for visa should be submitted through the VFS Global representation. Please visit the official website of Consular Department of MFA Georgia to find detailed information regarding to the visa procedures.
Note: Once the application is submitted in VFS Centre and payment receipt is generated, applicant needs to upload scanned payment receipt in Georgia online portal and updated application form needs to be submitted in VFS center. https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/ (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/)
Note – 04 months valid Travel and Health insurance required for all Long-Term visa categories.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Depending on the purpose of your travel to Georgia, there are different categories of visas that will apply to the occasion. Whether you are planning to go on a visit, study or work and reside there permanently, 
                                you will have to apply for a different Georgian Visa, accordingly. Depending on the purpose of travelling you may be granted a visa with the right of stay for a short-term period, long-term period or with the right 
                                for transiting the territory of Georgia. The authorized body for issuing, extending, and terminating Georgian visas is Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Georgia/Embassy of Georgia in India.
Short-term visa may be issued according to the number of days indicated in a visa application but for not more than 30 calendar days. And only if you have visited Georgia at least once during the previous year, 
                                and there are grounds for requesting short-term visa you may be granted with a short-term multiple-entry visa for a maximum of five years. Besides, the total period of an alien’s entry and stay in Georgia in any 
                                180-day period shall not exceed 90 calendar days.
Long-term visa may be issued with the right of multiple entries to Georgia for 90 calendar days or one year period of validity and stay.
Please note that all documents required for visa should be submitted through the VFS Global representation. Please visit the official website of Consular Department of MFA Georgia to find detailed information regarding to the visa procedures.
Note: Once the application is submitted in VFS Centre and payment receipt is generated, applicant needs to upload scanned payment receipt in Georgia online portal and updated application form needs to be submitted in VFS center. https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/ (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/)
Note – 04 months valid Travel and Health insurance required for all Long-Term visa categories.

## Visa Fees
Mode of Payment - Cash/Card.
The applicable visa fee in INR is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee is non-refundable.

[Table:   Long term immigration visa]
Service Fee:
1500 INR per application (Inc. of GST and Convenience Fee) for PAN India Centers
- Mandatory courier for satellite locations INR 846
- NEET Validation Charges INR 538/- for Medical Student category.
For Applicants applying from  Bangladesh
- The  acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by TT (Telegraphic transfer) US  Dollars (USD). Applicants can approach Bank of convenience, and should follow  the below process;
- Fill up a deposit slip & TM form with information of account details Embassy of Georgia 409000600421 RBL BANK with the below Swift Code
RATNINBBXXX
- Need  to carry and provide Passport copy
- Carry  print of the visa fee detail stated in the website
Applicant need to go to the VFS  center with the proof of visa fee payment.
- The  visa fee is non-refundable.
- There  is a service charge of BDT 4492/-
- The applicable visa fee is USD20.
For Applicants applying from Sri Lanka
- The visa fee is non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 9087/- (53 USD) Note : “Any demand draft having contradicting MICR number or incorrect information shall not be acceptable”
- The applicable visa fee is in LKR       4060/-.

## Documents Required
Please click here for Documents required for Work Visa (D1 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Interns and Mass Media (D2 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Student Visa (D3 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Family Reunion Visa (D4 category)

Please click here for Documents required for Individuals who have right of owning property in Georgia (D5 category)
Note: A document necessary to issue a visa shall be submitted to a visa issuing authority in Georgian or in English language. A document drawn up in another foreign language shall be submitted together with the duly certified (notarized) Georgian or English translation.
To issue a long-term Georgian visa, apostilled or legalized originals or copies of documents (if the documents need to be legalized or apostilled) shall be submitted to a visa issuing authority. 
Note – 04 months valid Travel and Health insurance required for all Long-Term visa categories.
NEET certificate validation mandatory for Indian medical students & need to be done at VFS centre.
NEET Verification Fee : 538 INR

## Photo Specifications
A digital copy of photograph with below specification needs to be uploaded when filling up online application form.
A recent digital colour photograph (digital photo 472 x 610 pixels in dimension; scanned photo – 4 x 5.16 cm in size, scanned at 300 DPI resolutions)
To fill Online application form kindly visit - https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/ (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/)
Photograph can be clicked at VFS

## Processing Time

- Processing time for Long-term visa applications (for D1, D2, D4, D5 category) at the Embassy of Georgia is minimum 2 month.
- Processing time for Long-term visa applications (for D3 category) at the Embassy of Georgia is as per below table:

[Table:   Long term immigration visa processing time]
- Important notice: The above‑mentioned periods start from the day the application is delivered to the Embassy of Georgia. To track the application delivery date, please visit “track  your application (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/AYvpqV+ro69aR1c81Q/VGoPJgA+rLXdPLREIT8WQZekZrmPsx/gq0paEDF6diBWtg==)”.
- Please, be informed that the processing time may  be reduced or prolonged, which you will be notified about by the Embassy of  Georgia.
- Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned estimated processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
- Please be sure to submit your visa application  well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.

## Online application Form
Kindly click here (https://geoconsul.gov.ge/en/) to fill online e-application form.
Please note that it is mandatory to upload all scanned supporting documents as specified in the checklist.

Service Fee:
1500 INR per application (Inc. of GST and Convenience Fee) for PAN India Centers
Mandatory courier for satellite locations INR 846 - Each applicant need to take courier service at VFS Centre's(Not Applicable for VFS - New Delhi)
For Applicants applying from  Bangladesh
- The  acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by TT (Telegraphic transfer) US  Dollars (USD). Applicants can approach Bank of convenience, and should follow  the below process;
- Fill up a deposit slip & TM form with information of account details Embassy of Georgia 409000600421 RBL BANK with the below Swift Code
RATNINBBXXX
- Need  to carry and provide Passport copy
- Carry  print of the visa fee detail stated in the website
Applicant need to go to the VFS  center with the proof of visa fee payment.
- The  visa fee is non-refundable.
- There  is a service charge of BDT 4492/-
- The applicable visa fee is USD20.
For Applicants applying from Sri Lanka
- The visa fee is non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 9087/- ( 53 USD) 
Note  : “Any demand draft having contradicting MICR number or incorrect information  shall not be acceptable”   The applicable visa fee is in LKR       4060/-.
visa_types.processing_time:
The Processing Time for the application at the Embassy of Georgia is 10 working days
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned estimated Processing Time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences
